title: Her Win Is Evidence, Not Threat
subtitle: An energy statement for releasing the scarcity response to another woman's success
excerpt: A short energy statement for the moment when another woman's financial win triggers a scarcity response. The release names the threat-reading; the allow names the capacity to see her success as proof of possibility rather than reduction of yours.
sourceNotes: Written for homemade.education, drawing on Day 16 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca Page, 2025). The release-and-allow framework is from The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024).

content.text: A short energy statement for the moment when another woman's win produces a scarcity reading rather than a celebration. The release names the belief that money is a finite pool that her win draws from. The allow names the alternative: her win as evidence that this is achievable.

I am ready to release every belief that her win comes at my expense, that money is a finite pool we're drawing from together, that her success makes mine less likely, and that I need to feel less for her to feel more. I release it now. I release it now. I release it now.

I am ready to align with and allow the understanding that her win is evidence of what is possible, that her success exists in her lane and mine in mine, and that I can want this for myself and still mean my congratulations. I allow it now. I allow it now. I allow it now.
Say each three times, slow, out loud or in your mind.
Written for homemade.education, drawing on Day 16 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca Page, 2025). The release-and-allow structure is from The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024).
